text.title: Sunset Failed Product Playbook Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Sunset Failed Product Playbook output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: shutdown_date populated with a typed value
customer_notice_template populated with a typed value
refund_policy populated with a typed value
data_export_url populated with a typed value
migration_recommendations populated with a typed value
retro_url populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
